_comment: THE CLAUDE CODE CAPTURE NERVE (working-memory Phase 1). UserPromptSubmit fires hooks/afferent-post.mjs — a fail-silent (~250ms), stdout-free, secret-scrubbing bridge that POSTs the captain's own words to the thalamus (:4113) as a 'code' afferent, so his forge study + FinOps turns flow into the ONE working memory with zero capture tax. Relative command (CWD = project root); never blocks the session; the thalamus being down is a silent no-op.
